cabin.quest.00003FCBB33E62C4.description: - &6Дошка оголошень&r дає можливість заробляти валюту для торгівлі.
Тут ви можете виконати різні доручення або придбати дозвіл на професію для використання в торговому автоматі.
- &6Ринок&r пропонує вам можливість витратити свої гроші на різноманітні цікаві та корисні предмети та гаджети.
- &6Постачання&r — це автоматизований спосіб обміну монет на ресурси. Тут ви можете придбати картки імпорту для використання в торговому автоматі.

- &3Заводський посібник&r містить корисну інформацію щодо напряму технологій та автоматизації. Усі завдання, які необхідно виконати, чітко розбиті на розділи та окремі завдання. Використання цього посібника є повністю добровільним.
- У розділі &3Металургія&r наведено огляд способів перероблення руди на чистий метал. Різні способи дають різну віддачу.
- &3Спрощення життя&r привертає увагу до всіх тих невеликих утиліт, які можуть допомогти вам подолати виклики, що стоять перед вами.

cabin.quest.6D26DAB7D0FF6E90.description: A central role in this age of technology is played by the Alchemical Laser.
cabin.quest.1D1D1FEAF49C5E11.description: A central role in your Laboratory is played by the Alchemical Laser.

cabin.quest.472FB03D0E5A38D6.description: A few of the following contraptions involve dropping items on the ground. Whenever a process will not backstack on overflow (e.g. belt items waiting automatically), it is important to toggle the production at certain buffer thresholds.

cabin.quest.4CC420A6B673176A.description: A good way to automate Sand at this moment is to build Strainers.

cabin.quest.3249CD08992F2BCD.description: A Pyrolisation process is not strictly required for Charcoal, but the increased yield makes it worthwhile if the wood supply is limited.
cabin.quest.6C4CB8F616A9C3DF.description: A reliable way to automate the Laser is to use two Cart Loaders, one to place a magnet, one to fill the remaining slots with Basalt Blocks. Move the cart under the laser and activate it. From here you can use one Unloader to extract the worn magnet as well as the desired output.

cabin.quest.2C7ADB6C11B918B1.description: About fifty inventions lie between you and the moon.

cabin.quest.24C48CFAAD71B230.description: Additional Processors are required in creating logistical components of ME Technology. At some point some Semi-Automation should come into consideration.

First off, refine your Silver Ingots with Ender Dust and Chorous Fruit.
cabin.quest.3CBED6B591BCEDEA.description: First, insert a 1k ME Storage Component into the Matter Condenser, set it to produce Matter Balls and then supply it with the most abundant flow of items you can come up with. Don't throw your valuables in; the items are consumed in the process.

cabin.quest.1127129CBA2B5E6F.description: For an actual piece of advice: it is pretty simple to set up a little circuit at a few points in your factory, which detect when an item has not been produced in a while. You can use redstone links to redirect those signals to a central control room, giving you an overview of which sections require maintenance.
cabin.quest.6B03056FA21424C0.description: For every path through this graph, the effective yield per ore can be estimated by multiplying the ratio of each included step.
cabin.quest.174E3A810535CAAC.description: For less hassles with manual effort, it is recommended to set up Ingot-to-Ingot semi-automation for creating Alloys using the setup above.

cabin.quest.4761DAE59CDD93AF.description: For powering our Rocket, we will require some very potent fuel. Search some of the warmer biomes or the oceans for crude oil to get started.
cabin.quest.27C191346BB14D9D.description: For production of chromatic materials, a colour pigment is needed. It is up to you which colour dye should be automated for this purpose. The only exception is white dye.
cabin.quest.7E59B7DC239E621E.description: For style points, you can use the same contraption to harvest both vine types simultaneously.
cabin.quest.223BB57AD0239511.description: For the all-mighty Infernal Mechanism, a bountiful source of soul essence is needed. Thankfully, the vines of the underworld seem to carry it in them.
cabin.quest.69311E02A8B3451D.description: For the calculations of the Guidance computer, we will need.. a lot of these Digits.
cabin.quest.5DCF9C8212AA3BE3.description: For the first time in the progression, a Blaze Burner is required. Obtain them by using Empty Blaze Burners on Blazes or their Spawners.
cabin.quest.194B973EAF17809C.description: For this next trick a supply of Wooden Sticks is required. Whether that calls for a new harvester or just a scheduled shipment from Contraption 1 is up to you.

cabin.quest.3126DE83A6741671.description: From here, plan via which calculations the other digits will be created, and how the cost can be minimised. Remember that each added calculation step ends up increasing the amount of Calculation Mechanisms required for the digit it leads to.

cabin.quest.47965C310D9847DC.description: It's finally time to put it all together.

Kelp is vital ingredient to our first Assembly Line target: Andesite Alloy.

cabin.quest.3025B5861FE17ADF.title: Let there be light
cabin.quest.11C36A243F5108DC.description: Like explained before, trains are a super useful option for item and fluid movement, especially with how cheap they are.
cabin.quest.5C4F6E63B02A25F0.description: Like with the andesite generator, drills should be used to harvest the deepslate, which will then need to be resmelted.

cabin.quest.6C029983EE2035A5.description: Logistic Mechanisms are all about efficiency and speed, and haste is a term that embodies that. To get started with brewing your own potions, you will need to brave a nether fortress and retrieve some nether wart to grow.
cabin.quest.3BE15AA5C237AB80.description: Magenta Paint Balls contain the essence needed for production of Chromatic Compound. Some will come directly from the crushed singularity, but the majority can be obtained by spectral correction on the other colours.

cabin.quest.28DAED70768C6A50.description: New options have opened up in the Overview. Whenever you are ready.
cabin.quest.7AAE71F57FB89BCC.description: Next up, we need Crushing Wheels. Not only as a machine, but as an ingredient, too.

cabin.quest.05C7E580ED88B556.title: Not the End
cabin.quest.2DC3AA8A89005C42.description: Note that Infernal Mechanisms are an ingredient to nothing else. The main assembly line will continue with Precision Mechanisms.
cabin.quest.68DF462185A9AF63.description: Note that Logistic Mechanisms are an ingredient to nothing else. The main assembly line will continue with Precision Mechanisms.
cabin.quest.342BB6EF80EBFDCA.description: Note that Sealed Mechanisms are an ingredient to nothing else. The main assembly line will continue with Kinetic Mechanisms.
cabin.quest.630DA0C83959E9D8.description: Note that the concete solution depends highly on the transmutation pairings of your World, which is why it cannot be laid out in this Guide. You can use JEI to find other necessary recipes leading up to the reagent you require.
cabin.quest.667F4F686A45EF3E.description: Note that trains are able to travel through unloaded chunks without issue, with only the stations themselves needing to be loaded.
cabin.quest.59E4A6163753BC12.description: Note: before the machine starts showering you with random furniture, place a wooden slab in the filter slot of the Mechanical Saw.
cabin.quest.5A199B898D41A309.description: Note: Ender dust and Singularities are consumed in a 1:1 ratio. They do not have to be in the exact same location. One TNT can transform up to two sets of ingredients. The result will drop at the location of the Singularity item.
cabin.quest.619E34A7DE48B991.description: Notice that the mixing process returns an inert quartz ready to be recharged using Contraption 14.
cabin.quest.3B431AAADE8845FA.description: Now that you have a passive supply of Silicon Reagent, you may head over to the main section of Chapter 4. You will have opened up an entry point near the end of its recipe chain.
cabin.quest.31EDFA6D2FF86CB0.description: Now that you have an idea of what is new and what is not, settle in and start your Journey.
cabin.quest.31EDFA6D2FF86CB0.title: Off you go
cabin.quest.38D19F4EC634F33B.description: Oh, and keep a backup of each fern somewhere safe.
cabin.quest.675C395B2074C24C.description: On the topic of gears, you can rightclick a gear with a plank and it will match its texture, just like waterwheels.
cabin.quest.397232F676CB621B.description: Once again it's time to grab the Wrench, re-stock the toolbox and to clear out a new plot.
cabin.quest.3C50B4556375178E.description: Once again, full automation of bonus mechanisms is not as pressing of a task, since they do not lead to any further machines beyond their own.
cabin.quest.05446225038D260A.description: Once found, the Chaos Catalyst can not only transmute a material into Silicon, but potentially create other valuable resources from the most trivial ingredients!
cabin.quest.3A63A48662F352CB.description: Once you are happy with the Assembly Line, head on back to the overview. There will be new options to explore.
cabin.quest.067C5FDA4709F195.description: One final pass in the Induction Smelter now produces a chunk of high-quality Silicon.
cabin.quest.6FDC8DA2FDED5FDD.description: One of the Reagents should lead not to another known one, but to the Reagent of Silicon. If this turns out to be one that is reasonably accessible, you can consider choosing this path of production over the main one.

cabin.quest.38D19F4EC634F33B.description: The cycle is simple: Cut the fern plant into halves using a Deployer, then throw one of the leaves into Spirit Fire. It is recommended to ensure that all colours of fern are duplicated at similar rates.

cabin.quest.4F7A70041B67A348.description: The Dream of walking the Moon's surface finally came to fruition.
cabin.quest.61147823CC87F711.description: The earliest inventions reveal ones resourcefulness with low level equipment: Auto-Crafting? None. Filtering? Not cheap! Item Transport? May the Belt Spaghetti mesh in your favour.
cabin.quest.5E62059675895213.description: The entire factory is started back up for one final sprint. With a steady supply of Calculation Mechanisms, the Digital Infrastucture performs the necessary operations to put together an ideal Trajectory.

cabin.quest.6C4CB8F616A9C3DF.description: The first Alchemical Laser forms activated basalz essence from Basalt. This works only if a charged FluxoMagnet is present alongside it in the Hopper Cart.

cabin.quest.780E8AE86250C73D.description: The Groundwork has been laid with all that has been created so far. The pace should really pick up from here.

cabin.quest.400CDC316DCDFE88.description: The Launch feels very close now. While there still lie challenges ahead, the solution footprint will shrink again thanks to the new Appliances.

cabin.quest.5799D55BB26BA52C.description: These Quests are an Automation Plan for your upcoming Assembly Line. Always view them as recommendations on what you should construct a passive supply for. The flowgraph depicts the connections between relevant recipes/processing.

cabin.quest.050A20198A80CF1A.description: This Contraption will need the special ability to both place and collect items from these places.
cabin.quest.09356B3BEF298E06.description: This is a unoffical port of CAB to 1.20 created by Pansmith, to take advantage of the new features create has to offer, as well as other mods.
cabin.quest.1BCFB709E97A74FA.description: This may reveal additional information about the correct combination as described in their tooltip.
cabin.quest.09EA580B3D32FEEB.description: This mysterious fellow is offering a puzzle box with seemingly endless layers of depth. As an expert you know that this can only be finite. But what will await you at the bottom?
cabin.quest.345B94F6D17605CD.description: This piece of quartz is too small. With enough water we might get somewhere.
cabin.quest.1DBFD0B34659A8F9.description: This torch can completely stop hostile mob spawns in a large radius, great for those wishing to do moody builds without having to deal with mobs.
cabin.quest.3B548F2C060C2229.description: This Trading card can convert the currency of coins inserted into the Trading Machine.

cabin.quest.2C7ADB6C11B918B1.description: Thousands of components will flow through the ever-growing sequence of your machines, providing the means to explore the next level of technology.
cabin.quest.286510750C333C1F.title: Throwing Flash

cabin.quest.3F00084D9474C381.title: Traders' Finest

cabin.quest.375C9A43FE5620B6.description: Transmuting the purple reactive blend requires very special heating conditions, only available on Campfires or Stoves.

cabin.quest.4BAC95CCC72369AD.description: True IT experts tend to avoid going outside much. Thankfully the necessary computer parts can now be delivered directly to their inventory!
cabin.quest.223BB57AD0239511.description: Twisting Vines grow upwards, you can gather them using Mechanical Harvesters.

cabin.quest.3AD7553F3C8593F9.description: Used to fill your spacesuit with oxygen.

cabin.quest.7D93DAB3E8ACF953.description: Various saplings prized for their unique leaves.
cabin.quest.7AAE71F57FB89BCC.description: Walls of Mechanical Crafters can quickly get in the way of paths and other infrastructure. Make sure to give them some space.

cabin.quest.2C2E304910D7F33D.title: Washing
cabin.quest.53735DC4231AB566.description: Washing the Gravel with an Encased Fan leaves you with Iron Nuggets and Flint.
cabin.quest.2FFFE1C5366930BB.title: Water Supply
cabin.quest.47965C310D9847DC.title: We Have Lift Off!
cabin.quest.7E59B7DC239E621E.description: Weeping Vines grow downwards from a ceiling. You can gather them with Mechanical Harvesters.
cabin.quest.09356B3BEF298E06.description: Welcome to CABIN: Create Above and Beyond In Newer
cabin.quest.5D0454F977C4F080.description: Welcome to the final Chapter of this Journey: building the Data Centre. What will this entail? Thousands of numeric calculations!
cabin.quest.75FB28B253B14876.description: Welcome to the Overview. You can always come back here to catch up on your current position in the Progression of Technology. If you look closely, your Journey to the Moon completes the final step of the way on the right side.
cabin.quest.286510750C333C1F.description: When dropped as an item, Chromatic Compound will absorb light around itself and eventually turn into Refined Radiance. Choose one of three approaches:
cabin.quest.4B52A04818075900.title: Where mob ?
cabin.quest.7D872F933F45809B.description: While Copper Machines will definitely be required going forward; full automation of their ingredients is completely optional.
cabin.quest.5E62059675895213.description: While this Data Center visibly crunches the numbers, the designated Astronaut starts getting themselves and the spaceship prepared for launch.
cabin.quest.08716DBF9C882623.description: With Calculation Mechanisms, the Factory enters the Digital Age. Instant Material-Energy conversion (ME) revolutionises item and fluid logistics for both the assembly lines and personal use.
cabin.quest.0E98B4D2BBF55308.description: With Kinetic Mechanisms automated, many new possibilities unfold. Most of Create's machinery can now be crafted without much hassle. The early game just got a bit less early!
cabin.quest.1127129CBA2B5E6F.description: With new circuitry and wiring capability, you can make your factory a little smarter. Also those lamps you can make are really pretty.
cabin.quest.5B0727505DC791DF.description: With perseverance (or just waiting), you managed to gather the resources to create one.
cabin.quest.69275ECFC147E15B.description: With Precision Mechanisms automated, a large number of great tools become accessible. Both for automation and quality of life.
cabin.quest.4F7A70041B67A348.description: With that, the role of this Factory Guide has been fulfilled. Enjoy building up your new Hi-Tech Empire, and we'll see you in the next modpack!
cabin.quest.729FB5DD07C234E8.description: With the help of Encased Fans, sand can be refined into clay.
cabin.quest.09EB29F838620371.description: With the help of Schematicannons, any .nbt Schematic can be built into your world. Use it to replicate parts of your Building, or even to prepare it in a completely different World ahead of time.
cabin.quest.73473DC7269EC5B0.description: With the Launch Pad in place, it is time put it all together to construct your Spaceship.
cabin.quest.6BC864CC7CB2C316.description: With the rise of Inductive Machinery, you'll want to have the option to connect dynamos and machines together in an energy grid.
cabin.quest.630DA0C83959E9D8.description: With the transmutation recipe in hand, it is time to build a facility able to create an infinite amount of Silicon Reagent via Laser Alchemy and the other steps part of the process.
cabin.quest.4E85C8A2EEEB57C3.description: Without the operators, a data center would not be able to combine digits into others. Provide your Calculators with an automated supply of any operator they end up requiring.
cabin.quest.46820FBDDDEE491E.title: Wood Delivery
cabin.quest.397232F676CB621B.description: Working towards a passive supply of Radiant Induction Coils, you'll be sure to encounter some new and unfamiliar tasks.
cabin.quest.736FC31210F334F2.description: Write an application explaining why exactly your organisation is worth investing in.
cabin.quest.2F469F6F1511D9C4.description: You can add a destruction core to give it the option to destory blocks instead.
cabin.quest.661807F8ED723EEB.description: You can even get one of these in the store, so it may be worth spending your early coins on to make the earlygame mining trip go by much quicker.
cabin.quest.4F95D5136E944ADB.description: You can just keep on pulverising it. Sky Stone blocks never seem to lose mass in the process. What a world we live in!
cabin.quest.0E98B4D2BBF55308.description: You can now continue, or choose to spend some time in the bonus sections of Chapter 1. After all, a stronger supply of Copper and Gold Machines will come to be quite useful, too!

cabin.quest.3A428CA43D545DB9.description: &bEMI&r is the list of all items that you see every time you open your inventory. It's the better(tm) recipe book that shows you all available items and recipes in the modpack. Note that &bEMI&r is based on &bJEI&r, and people tend to use the names interchangably.
To see it in action, pull up a quest that requires an item of some sort and just click the item!

cabin.quest.522065CE0A5CE9D2.title: Gone fishing
cabin.quest.522065CE0A5CE9D2.description: If you ever need a break from all the factory building, why not go fishing? You can catch fish, treasure, and more while fishing.
The tacklebox can be used to upgrade and customize your fishing rod, as well as store bait.
The fruits of your labor may prove to be useful in your factory as well!
cabin.quest.012E50977D8EEEDB.description: When looking a recipe in EMI, you've likely noticed 3 buttons that appear on each recipe, being &c[❤]&r, &a[┴]&r, and &9[+]&r.

Let's start with &9[+]&r, as it's the simplest: right-click a crafting table, look up the recipe you need and press the &9[+]&r button: if you have all required items for the recipe, this will put them all into the crafting table for you.

&c[❤]&r and &a[┴]&r are used in tandem to create &arecipe trees&r. Pressing &a[┴]&r will pull up a &arecipe tree&r for that given item. Pressing &c[❤]&r on a recipe will mark it as the &cdefault recipe&r for that item, and will show that recipe (and the items used to craft it) in &arecipe trees&r. You can then add &cdefault recipes&r for the items used to craft that recipe, repeat ad nauseam. Note that you can click on a item in the &arecipe tree&r and its recipes will be pulled up.

In the &arecipe tree&r GUI, you can change the batch size by scrolling on the number to the right of the final result. Finally, and most importantly, you can press the &6Magnifying Glass&r to switch to &6Crafting Tree Mode&r, this will &edisplay the items that you need for every step to craft the number of items that you specified&r in your sidebar, and will dynamically update as you craft items. You can click on these &6Synthetic Favorites&r with your Craft to Inventory bind (unbound by default) to &eautomatically craft and then push items back into your inventory&r when using a crafting table, or push the exact number of items needed if using a different inventory.&r

Also note that EMI will commit &cdefault recipes&r to memory, meaning that as you save more and more recipes, EMI will remember them all, and will automatically use them when you pull up a &arecipe tree&r for any given item. Also, you can change the &cdefault recipe&r for an item, and EMI will automatically update the &arecipe tree&r as well. You can also click the &a[┴]&r button found in the bottom left of your inventory screen and it will pull up the &arecipe tree&r GUI as well.
